non-fund based facilities like opening of LCs, providing guarantees and

With effect from March 30, 2012, in case of bills drawn under LCs restricted to
a particular UCB, and the beneficiary of the LC is not a borrower who has been
granted regular credit facility by that UCB, the UCB concerned may, as per their
discretion and based on their perception about the credit worthiness of the LC
issuing bank, negotiate such LCs, subject to the condition that the proceeds will
be remitted to the regular banker of the beneficiary of the LC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , as per their discretion and based on their perception about the credit worthiness of the lc issuing bank, negotiate such lcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as on the borrower and risk weight assigned accordingly
controls.control_description:
In the
case of negotiations 'under reserve' the exposure shall be treated as on the
borrower and risk weight assigned accordingly.

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish genuineness of underlying transactions / documents
controls.control_description:
While purchasing / discounting / negotiating bills under LCs or otherwise, UCBs
shall establish genuineness of underlying transactions / documents.

The practice of drawing bills of exchange claused 'without recourse' and issuing
letters of credit bearing the legend 'without recourse' shall be discouraged because
such notations deprive the negotiating bank of the right of recourse it has against
the drawer under the Negotiable Instruments Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be discouraged because such notations deprive the negotiating bank of the right of recourse it has against the drawer under the negotiable instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, open lcs and purchase / discount / negotiate bills bearing the 'without recourse' clause
controls.control_description:

LCs and purchase / discount / negotiate bills bearing the 'without recourse' clause.

controls.control_description:

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly identified, and a proper record thereof maintained at the branches conducting the bills business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be circumspect while discounting bills drawn by front finance companies set up by large industrial groups on other group companies

controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:
In order to promote payment discipline which would to a certain extent
encourage acceptance of bills, all corporate and other constituent borrowers
having turnover above threshold level as fixed by the bank's Board of Directors
should be mandated to disclose 'aging schedule' of their overdue payables in their
periodical returns submitted to banks.

controls.control_description:

the NBFC - Investment and Credit Companies (NBFC-ICC), subject to the
following limits:
Type of NBFC Maximum Limit on
Bank Finance
Note

the overall ceiling of borrowing by NBFCs, upto ten times of their NOF.

(1) UCBs would provide direct finance only to members (no nominal members)
and not through any agency like primary agricultural credit societies and
primary land development banks etc.,
(2) Credit should be extended only after obtaining 'no dues certificate' from the
existing credit agencies in the area, and

issued by RBI / NABARD.

acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

repealed.

being in force.

clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
